"And in this mountain [Zion] shall the Lord of hosts make unto all people a feast of fat things," wrote Isaiah, "a feast of wines on the lees, of fat things full of marrow, of wines on the lees well refined" (Isaiah 25:6). It is a gospel feast of which the ancient prophet wrote, a meal worthy to be placed before the children of a King, even…

fat things full of marrow.
